name: Zucchini and Onion Kabobs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large baking dish and mix thoroughly.
2. Cover the dish and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours to allow the vegetables to marinate.
3. Remove the vegetables from the marinade (reserve the marinade), and alternate zucchini and onion pieces on skewers.
4. Grill the kabobs, about 6 inches above medium heat, basting frequently with the reserved marinade, for approximately 20 minutes.
5. Transfer the kabobs to a platter and garnish with lemon wedges.
6. Serve with the remaining marinade.
8 servings
Serving size: 1/2 cup
Exchanges:
Vegetable Exchange -- 2 Calories -- 61 Calories from Fat -- 7 Total Fat -- 1g Saturated Fat -- 0g Cholesterol -- 0mg Sodium -- 324mg Carbohydrate -- 13g Dietary Fiber -- 2g Sugars -- 9g Protein -- 2g
